title: PromptScout: Increase Brand Visibility in AI chats, Outrank Competitors | Product Hunt
excerpt: PromptScout shows whether your brand is visible in AI chats, which competitors are visible instead, and what to do next to get mentioned by ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews and Bing Copilot. Monitor 5 AI platforms, connect Google Search Console, Bing Webmaster Tools and Live AI Traffic, then turn the evidence into weekly Tasks. Complete the task with an agent of your choice through PromptScout's MCP server.
content_html: PromptScout shows whether your brand is visible in AI chats, which competitors are visible instead, and what to do next to get mentioned by ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews and Bing Copilot. Monitor 5 AI platforms, connect Google Search Console, Bing Webmaster Tools and Live AI Traffic, then turn the evidence into weekly Tasks. Complete the task with an agent of your choice through PromptScout's MCP server.

sentences.en: PromptScout shows whether your brand is visible in AI chats, which competitors are visible instead, and what to do next to get mentioned by ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews and Bing Copilot.
sentences.zh: PromptScout 显示您的品牌在 AI 聊天中是否可见、哪些竞争对手可见，以及接下来要做什么才能被 ChatGPT、Gemini、Perplexity、Google AI Overviews 和 Bing Copilot 提及。

sentences.en: Monitor 5 AI platforms, connect Google Search Console, Bing Webmaster Tools and Live AI Traffic, then turn the evidence into weekly Tasks.
sentences.zh: 监控 5 个 AI 平台，连接 Google Search Console、Bing 网站管理员工具和实时 AI 流量，然后将证据转化为每周任务。

sentences.en: Complete the task with an agent of your choice through PromptScout's MCP server.
sentences.zh: 通过 PromptScout 的 MCP 服务器与您选择的代理一起完成任务。

content_html_zh: PromptScout 显示您的品牌在 AI 聊天中是否可见、哪些竞争对手可见，以及接下来要做什么才能被 ChatGPT、Gemini、Perplexity、Google AI Overviews 和 Bing Copilot 提及。 监控 5 个 AI 平台，连接 Google Search Console、Bing 网站管理员工具和实时 AI 流量，然后将证据转化为每周任务。 通过 PromptScout 的 MCP 服务器与您选择的代理一起完成任务。
